extracted.title: Construction and Maintenance Schedule - Updated (April 7, 2026)
extracted.description:
As a courtesy, Northern Border Pipeline (NBPL) hereby notifies customers of the Construction and Maintenance Schedule posted under "Construction and Maintenance" on the Informational Postings website. NBPL reminds customers to please check the Maintenance Schedule on a regular basis.

Changes since last posting:
- Date Change – Glen Ullin Station 6 Bison XP ESD outage – from original dates of 4/14 through 4/16 to new dates of 4/17 through 4/19
- Date Change – Manning Station 5 Bison XP ESD Testing - from original date of 4/22 to new date of 4/23
- Date Change – Clark Station 10 TSA Automation Upgrade outage – from original dates of 4/23 through 5/22 to new dates of 4/24 through 5/22

Additionally, the following file(s) can be located on Informational Postings under Construction and Maintenance
2026 NBPL maintenance schedule 040726.pdf
